creator: yuxi@gmx.net
text:
Katapult is a KDE application that gives you faster access to your applications, bookmarks, and more! It is plugin-based and can launch anything it has a plugin for. Its plugin-driven appearance is completely customizable. Katapult was inspired by Quicksilver for OS X, and it is written in C++.

WWW: http://wiki.thekatapult.org.uk/Home
